projects.title: Would you like to make a game?
projects.description: A tiny canvas game starter with a moving comet, collectible sparks, and obvious first pull request ideas.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: Start with a tiny playable canvas, change one idea, and send the first Kidzone pull request.

safety.privacy: Local-only canvas play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help is useful for the first pull request or code edit.
safety.notes: Starter game encourages small, visible changes instead of passive scrolling.

projects.title: World of Poo
projects.description: Build goo structures toward the pipe, manage limited goo balls, switch modes, and solve each physics level.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A goo-physics puzzle game with bridges, pipes, level goals, pickup mode, explosions, and extra mischief.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview is useful because of silly bathroom humor and physics controls.
safety.notes: Contains cartoon bathroom humor and mild explosion effects.

externalDependencies.name: Matter.js
externalDependencies.reason: Physics engine for the goo-building puzzle prototype.

projects.title: Math Knitting
projects.description: Solve arithmetic problems to keep yarn flowing, grow the scarf, and complete the knitting project.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A math practice game where correct answers add yarn and help finish a knitted project.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help may be useful for younger players practicing arithmetic.
safety.notes: Wrong answers reduce yarn, so a gentler mode may be a future improvement.

projects.title: Astro Bot Screensaver
projects.description: Watch multiple bot faces drift, blink, glow, and track the pointer with animated LED-style eyes.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A bouncing Astro Bot-inspired screensaver with animated dot-matrix eyes and playful motion.

safety.privacy: Local-only animation with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.notes: Screensaver-style motion; keep animation calm and avoid flashing effects.

projects.title: Photo by Numbers
projects.description: Turn photos into line drawings with selectable edge algorithms, then color and download the result.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A photo-to-coloring-page tool with webcam or upload input, edge detection, and interactive coloring.

safety.privacy: Photos are processed locally in the browser; no upload, account, chat, or public sharing is built in.
safety.adultHelp: Adult help is recommended for camera permission, photo choices, and downloads.
safety.notes: Uses camera or local image files and can download finished artwork.

projects.title: Cheeseworld
projects.description: Move, jump, collect cheese, grab speed boosts, and survive the hazards in this mousey platformer.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A platform game about collecting cheese, leveling up, and dodging a cat and grumpy old man.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview may be useful for younger players because of cartoon hazards.
safety.notes: Includes chasing and survival-style platformer hazards.

projects.title: Old Rules
projects.description: Choose a player, dodge the grandparents and Mr. Whiskers, collect keys, and escape the house.
projects.dateSource: earliest creation timestamp across project files
projects.summary: A retro escape game about sneaking through Grandma's house, finding keys, and avoiding trouble.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.adultHelp: Adult preview may be useful because the theme includes sneaking and being chased.
safety.notes: Retro escape game with cartoon household trouble and mild chase tension.

projects.title: Color Mixer Lab
projects.description: A color mixing game where each level asks players to create a target shade using only five paint colors.
projects.summary: Mix red, yellow, blue, white, and brown to match five mystery target colors.

safety.privacy: Local-only play with no accounts, chat, sharing, or saved data.
safety.notes: No timers or score pressure; wrong mixes simply retry the same level.
